logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var groupedPayload = vars.shipmentData.value groupBy $.pick_ticket_no
--- groupedPayload pluck ((records, pickTicketNo) -> { b2bMessage: { header: { purposeCode: records[0].BSN01_Purpose, shipDate: records[0].BSN03_Date, shipTime: do { var time = records[0].BSN04_Time default "00:00" --- (time as LocalTime {format: "H:m"}) as String {format: "HHmm"} },
shipNoticeNumber: records[0].BSN02_ShipNoticeNo, receiverId: records[0].TP_edi_isa05_id, senderId: "",
shippedDateQualifier: records[0].DTM01_ShippedDateQual, shippedDate: records[0].DTM02_ShippedDate,
estimatedDeliveryDateQualifier: records[0].DTM01_EstDeliveryDateQual, estimatedDeliveryDate: records[0].DTM02_EstDeliveryDate },
detail: { shipmentInformation: {
carrierInformation: { routingQualifier: records[0].TD501_RoutingQual, IdQualifier: records[0].TD502_IDQual, carrierId: records[0].TD503_CarrierID, transportationMethodCode: records[0].TD504_TransMethod },
measurementRef: records[0].MEA01_MeasurementRef, weightQualifier: records[0].MEA02_WeightQualifier, weight: records[0].MEA03_Weight, unitOfMeasure: records[0].MEA04_UnitOfMeasure,
trackingQual: records[0].REF01_TrackingQual, trackingNo: records[0].REF02_TrackingNo,
bolQual: records[0].REF01_BOLQual, billOfLadingNumber: records[0].REF02_BillOfLadingNo,
shipmentTerms: records[0].FOB01_ShipmentTerms,
partyInformation: [ { partyCode: records[0].N101_SF_Qual, name: records[0].N102_SF_Name, codeQualifier: records[0].N103_SF_IDQual, identificationCode: records[0].N104_SF_ID, addressLine1: records[0].N301_SF_Addr, city: records[0].N401_SF_City, state: records[0].N402_SF_State, zipCode: records[0].N403_SF_Zip }, { partyCode: records[0].N101_ST_Qual, name: records[0].N102_ST_Name, codeQualifier: records[0].N103_ST_IDQual, identificationCode: records[0].N104_ST_ID, addressLine1: records[0].N301_ST_Addr, city: records[0].N401_ST_City, state: records[0].N402_ST_State, zipCode: records[0].N403_ST_Zip }, { partyCode: records[0].N101_BY_Qual, name: records[0].N102_BY_Name, codeQualifier: records[0].N103_BY_IDQual, identificationCode: records[0].N104_BY_ID, addressLine1: records[0].N301_BY_Addr, city: records[0].N401_BY_City, state: records[0].N402_BY_State, zipCode: records[0].N403_BY_Zip }, { partyCode: records[0].N101_VN_Qual, name: records[0].N102_VN_Name, codeQualifier: records[0].N103_VN_IDQual, identificationCode: records[0].N104_VN_ID, addressLine1: records[0].N301_VN_Addr, city: records[0].N401_VN_City, state: records[0].N402_VN_State, zipCode: records[0].N403_VN_Zip } ],
orderInformation: { poNumber: records[0].PRF01_CustPO, sourceOrderNumber: records[0].order_no,
lineItems: records map ((item) -> { buyersPartNumber: item.LIN03_BuyerPart, vendorsItemNumber: item.LIN05_VendPart, upc: item.LIN07_UPC, shippedQuantity: item.SN102_QtyShipped as Number,
uom: item.SN103_UOM, descriptionType: item.PID01_ItemDescType, productDescription: item.PID05_ProductDescription,
packListNo: item.REF02_PackListNo, barCodedSerialNo: item.REF02_BarCodedSerialNo }) } } } } })

logger.doc:name: LOG DEBUG: Parallel for each
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Parllel for each process started", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, poMapping: payload }]

parallel-foreach.doc:name: Parallel For Each : Iteration over Shipments

logger.doc:name: Log DEBUG: APM Request
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "APM flow start", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId }]

logger.doc:name: LOG DEBUG: APM Response
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "APM flow ended", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.transmissionId }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "SUCCESS", shipNoticeNumber: payload.b2bMessage.header.purchaseOrderNumber, partnerId: payload.b2bMessage.header.receiverId, transmissionId: vars.transmissionId }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST") (400) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_FOUND") (404) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") (405) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE") (406) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE") (415) else (500)

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing error payload for transaction api

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "FAILED", partnerId: payload.b2bMessage.header.receiverId, poNumber: payload.b2bMessage.header.purchaseOrderNumber default "UNKNOWN", transmissionId: payload.b2bMessage.header.sellerOrderNumber default null, error: error.description, statusCode: vars.httpStatus, errorType: error.errorType.parentErrorType.identifier, statusMessage: (error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier), description: if ((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) contains "RETRY_EXHAUSTED") error.description else error.detailedDescription }

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Error
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Errored PO", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, poSummary: payload }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- entriesOf( payload filter ($.payload.status == "FAILED") groupBy ($.payload.partnerId) ) map (entry) -> { partnerId: entry.key, errors: entry.value map (item) -> { poNo: item.payload.poNumber, transmissionIdApm: item.payload.transmissionId default "APM request failed for this PO", "Error Details": if(!isEmpty(( item.payload.error scan /\$\.B2BMessage\.Header\.partyInformation\[1\]\.(\w+): null found, string expected/ ) map ($[1] ++ " is null"))) (( item.payload.error scan /\$\.B2BMessage\.Header\.partyInformation\[1\]\.(\w+): null found, string expected/ ) map ($[1] ++ " is null")) else [item.payload.error] }, "statusMessage": flatten(entry.value.payload."statusMessage"), "description": flatten(entry.value.payload.description), "status": flatten(entry.value.payload.statusCode), "errorType": flatten(entry.value.payload.errorType) }

foreach.doc:name: For Each: Iteration Over Errored Shipments

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing Email Template, var : subject, vendorName

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output text/plain fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v fun present(v) = v != null and (v as String) != "" fun resolvePartner(pId) = if (p('partner.outbound.' ++ pId) != null) p('partner.outbound.' ++ pId) else pId var partner = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var partnerId = resolvePartner(safe(partner.partnerId as String, "UNKNOWN")) var partnerErrors = partner.errors default [] var poNumbers = (partnerErrors map ((e) -> e.poNo as String)) filter present($) var poSegment = if (sizeOf(poNumbers) > 0) ("PO(s) " ++ (poNumbers joinBy ", ")) else "N/A" fun extractHttpCode(desc) = do { var d = (desc default "") as String var match = d find /[( ](\d{3})[) .]/ --- if (!isEmpty(match) and !isEmpty(match[0])) (d[(match[0][0] + 1) to (match[0][0] + 3)] as Number default 0) else 0 } fun resolveErrorType(apmType, httpCode) = if (httpCode == 401) "UNAUTHORIZED" else if (httpCode == 403) "FORBIDDEN" else if (httpCode == 404) "NOT_FOUND" else if (httpCode == 400) "BAD_REQUEST" else if (httpCode >= 500) "SERVER_ERROR" else if (upper(apmType) == "CONNECTIVITY") "CONNECTIVITY" else if (upper(apmType) == "TIMEOUT") "TIMEOUT" else if (upper(apmType) == "VALIDATION") "VALIDATION" else if (upper(apmType) != "") upper(apmType) else "UNKNOWN" fun buildErrorConfig(resolvedType, descStr) = if (resolvedType == "CONNECTIVITY") { title: "APM Connection Failure", bannerColor: "#dc2626", errorCode: "APM_CONNECTION_ERROR", category: "CONNECTIVITY", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [CONNECTIVITY] while sending to APM. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because Mule could not connect to the APM endpoint." ++ "\n 1. Verify the APM endpoint URL and port in the Mule connector configuration." ++ "\n 2. Check DNS resolution and firewall rules between Mule and APM." ++ "\n 3. Confirm the APM service is running and accepting inbound connections." ++ "\n 4. Review VPN, proxy, or network peering configuration." ++ "\n 5. Once connectivity is restored, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until the connection issue is fully resolved." } else if (resolvedType == "NOT_FOUND") { title: "APM Endpoint Not Found (404)", bannerColor: "#f59e0b", errorCode: "APM_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND", category: "CONFIGURATION", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [NOT_FOUND] — the APM endpoint returned HTTP 404. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because the APM endpoint URL returned 404." ++ "\n 1. Verify the APM endpoint URL configured in Mule matches the deployed APM route exactly." ++ "\n 2. Confirm with the APM team that the route is deployed and active in the correct environment." ++ "\n 3. Check if the APM application was redeployed or the route was renamed/moved." ++ "\n 4. Update the Mule endpoint URL property and redeploy if misconfigured." ++ "\n 5. Once the correct URL is confirmed, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until the APM route is confirmed reachable." } else if (resolvedType == "TIMEOUT") { title: "APM Request Timeout", bannerColor: "#f97316", errorCode: "APM_TIMEOUT_ERROR", category: "TIMEOUT", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [TIMEOUT] — the APM endpoint did not respond within the allowed time. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission timed out waiting for APM." ++ "\n 1. Check APM service health and response times via the APM monitoring dashboard." ++ "\n 2. Increase the HTTP request timeout in the Mule connector if APM is under load." ++ "\n 3. Confirm no payload or transformation bottleneck is causing delays on the APM side." ++ "\n 4. Coordinate with the APM team to investigate slow processing for: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n 5. Once stable, resubmit the affected transactions." ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until the APM team confirms the service is stable." } else if (resolvedType == "UNAUTHORIZED") { title: "APM Authentication Failure (401)", bannerColor: "#7c3aed", errorCode: "APM_UNAUTHORIZED", category: "SECURITY", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [UNAUTHORIZED] — APM rejected the request due to missing or invalid credentials (HTTP 401). " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because APM returned 401 Unauthorized." ++ "\n 1. Verify the API key, client ID/secret, or bearer token configured in Mule is current." ++ "\n 2. Check if APM credentials have expired or been rotated recently." ++ "\n 3. Confirm the correct authentication scheme is being used (Basic, OAuth2, API Key, etc.)." ++ "\n 4. Update credentials in the Mule secure properties vault and redeploy." ++ "\n 5. Once credentials are corrected, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until valid credentials are in place." } else if (resolvedType == "FORBIDDEN") { title: "APM Access Denied (403)", bannerColor: "#7c3aed", errorCode: "APM_FORBIDDEN", category: "SECURITY", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [FORBIDDEN] — APM denied access (HTTP 403). " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because APM returned 403 Forbidden." ++ "\n 1. Confirm the Mule service account has the correct role/scope in APM." ++ "\n 2. Check if an IP whitelist or policy is blocking the Mule runtime IP." ++ "\n 3. Review the APM API policy (rate limiting, client allow-list, contract enforcement)." ++ "\n 4. Engage the APM team to grant permissions or whitelist the Mule IP." ++ "\n 5. Once access is granted, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until the permission issue is resolved." } else if (resolvedType == "SERVER_ERROR") { title: "APM Internal Server Error (5xx)", bannerColor: "#dc2626", errorCode: "APM_SERVER_ERROR", category: "SERVER_ERROR", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [SERVER_ERROR] — APM returned a server-side error while processing the 850 Purchase Order. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed due to an internal error on the APM side." ++ "\n 1. Check the APM application logs for stack traces around the time of failure." ++ "\n 2. Confirm APM service health (memory, CPU, DB connections) in its monitoring dashboard." ++ "\n 3. Determine if the failure is transient (overload) or persistent (bug/misconfiguration)." ++ "\n 4. Escalate to the APM team with the transmissionId and timestamp." ++ "\n 5. Once APM confirms stability, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until APM confirms the root cause is fixed." } else if (resolvedType == "BAD_REQUEST") { title: "APM Bad Request (400)", bannerColor: "#f59e0b", errorCode: "APM_BAD_REQUEST", category: "PAYLOAD_ERROR", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [BAD_REQUEST] — APM rejected the 850 payload with HTTP 400. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because APM could not process the request payload." ++ "\n 1. Review the 850 payload — check for missing required fields or incorrect data types." ++ "\n 2. Validate the payload against the APM API schema or contract." ++ "\n 3. Check that all required HTTP headers (Content-Type, Accept, etc.) are correctly set." ++ "\n 4. Coordinate with the APM team to identify which field triggered the rejection." ++ "\n 5. Fix the payload mapping and resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit the same payload — fix the data issue first." } else if (resolvedType == "VALIDATION") { title: "JSON Schema at Process API Failure", bannerColor: "#f59e0b", errorCode: "APM_VALIDATION_ERROR", category: "VALIDATION", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [VALIDATION] — JSON Schema at Process API Failure. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed because one or more fields in the payload did not pass APM validation." ++ "\n 1. Review the validation error details returned by APM in the error description above." ++ "\n 2. Identify the specific field(s) that failed validation (e.g., missing mandatory elements, incorrect format, invalid code values)." ++ "\n 3. Validate the 850 payload against the APM API schema and EDI 850 X12 contract requirements." ++ "\n 4. Check all date formats, numeric ranges, code set values, and mandatory segment presence." ++ "\n 5. Coordinate with the APM team to obtain the full validation error report for: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n 6. Correct the failing field(s) in the mapping transformation and resubmit." ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit the same payload — the data issue must be resolved first." } else { title: "APM Transmission Error", bannerColor: "#6b7280", errorCode: "APM_UNKNOWN_ERROR", category: "UNKNOWN", message: "850 transmission failed with error type [" ++ resolvedType ++ "] while sending the 850 Purchase Order to APM. " ++ descStr, resolution: "The 850 transmission failed with an unclassified error type [" ++ resolvedType ++ "] from APM." ++ "\n 1. Review the full Mule error log for root cause and stack trace." ++ "\n 2. Check the APM logs for a corresponding failure at the same timestamp." ++ "\n 3. Escalate to the integration team with the correlationId and transmissionId." ++ "\n 4. Once root cause is identified, resubmit: " ++ poSegment ++ "\n\n Do NOT resubmit until the root cause is understood." } var descStr = ((partner.description default [])[0] default "") as String var apmType = ((partner.errorType default [])[0] default "") as String var httpCode = extractHttpCode(descStr) var resolvedType = resolveErrorType(apmType, httpCode) var errorConfig = buildErrorConfig(resolvedType, "") var transmissionId = (partnerErrors map ((e) -> safe(e.transmissionIdApm as String, "N/A"))) joinBy " | " var partnerRows = do { var poCount = sizeOf(partnerErrors) var firstPo = partnerErrors[0] default {} var firstRow = "" ++ "" ++ partnerId ++ "" ++ "" ++ resolvedType ++ "" ++ "" ++ safe(firstPo.poNo as String, "N/A") ++ "" ++ "" ++ ((firstPo."Error Details" default []) joinBy "
") ++ "" ++ "" var remainingRows = (partnerErrors[1 to -1] default []) map ((poEntry) -> "" ++ "" ++ safe(poEntry.poNo as String, "N/A") ++ "" ++ "" ++ ((poEntry."Error Details" default []) joinBy "
") ++ "" ++ "" ) --- [firstRow] ++ remainingRows } var validationHtml = if (sizeOf(partnerRows) > 0) "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ "" ++ (partnerRows joinBy "") ++ "
Partner IDError TypePO NumberError Details
" else "Error occurred but no detailed information available." var data = { flowDirection: "OUTBOUND", documentType: "850", appName: p('api.name') default "Mule Application", transactionType: "850", environment: upper(p('mule.env') default "DEV"), flowName: safe(vars.flowName, "850 Outbound Validation"), route: "P21 → Mule → APM", partnerName: partnerId ++ " — " ++ sizeOf(partnerErrors) ++ " PO(s) failed [" ++ resolvedType ++ "]", errorTitle: errorConfig.title, bannerColor: errorConfig.bannerColor, errorType: resolvedType, errorCategory: errorConfig.category, status: "FAILED", errorCode: errorConfig.errorCode, message: errorConfig.message, errorResolution: errorConfig.resolution, errorDescription: validationHtml, transmissionId: transmissionId, keyLabel: "Correlation ID", vendorName: partnerId, companyName: (vars.purchaseOrderData.value.company_no[0] default "N/A"), key: correlationId, businessKey: poSegment, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"} } var template = readUrl("classpath://templates/error-template.html", "text/plain") --- template replace /\$\{(\w+)\}/ with ((m) -> (data[m[1]] as String) default "" )

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/json
fun present(v) = v != null and (v as String) != "" fun safe(v, d="N/A") = if (v == null or (v is String and trim(v) == "")) d else v fun resolvePartner(pId) = if (p('partner.outbound.' ++ pId) != null) p('partner.outbound.' ++ pId) else pId
var partner = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload
var partnerId = resolvePartner(safe(partner.partnerId as String, "UNKNOWN")) var poNumbers = (partner.errors default []) map ((e) -> e.poNo as String) filter present($)
var vendorSegment = if (present(partnerId)) partnerId else null var poSegment = if (sizeOf(poNumbers) > 0) "PO " ++ (poNumbers joinBy ", ") else null
var env = p('mule.env') default null var apiName = p('api.name') default null var intType = vars.integration."integration-type" default vars.initialVariables."integration-type" default null
var segments = [ if (present(env)) upper(env) else null, "FCG ERROR ALERT", if (present(intType)) intType else null, poSegment ] filter present($) --- segments joinBy " | "

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]
